<!--
This template is for THIRD-PARTY CONTRIBUTIONS, which take the form of a
draft plan, not a code patch. See documentation/developer-documentation/contributing.md.

A contribution should add a single draft plan file under product/plans/draft/
describing WHAT a change does — not how it's implemented. The project converts
plans into code.

- Bugs and high-level feature requests: please open a GitHub issue instead.
- Code, tests, or config changes: these are not the contribution path. Rework
  the idea into a draft plan and the project will write the code.
-->

## This PR adds a draft plan

- **Plan file:** `product/plans/draft/<your-plan>.md`
- **What it does (one line):**

## Contribution checklist

- [ ] This PR adds **exactly one** draft plan file under `product/plans/draft/`.
- [ ] The plan describes **behavior** — what the change does and how you'll know it's done.
- [ ] The plan contains **no implementation details** — no file paths, function names, module structure, or data types.
- [ ] The plan states what is **out of scope**.
- [ ] This PR contains **no source, test, or configuration changes** (those are written by the project from the plan).

<!--
Filing a bug or a high-level feature idea instead? Close this PR and open a
GitHub issue: https://github.com/thirtysixthspan/janissary/issues
-->
